title: Deep Dive
description: ITSI deep dives are investigative tools that help you identify and troubleshoot issues in your IT environment. You can use deep dives to view KPI search results over time, zoom-in on KPI metrics and log events, and visually correlate root cause. You can add different types of lanes to a deep dive view, including KPI lanes, which let you view KPI metrics in detail. You can also add lanes to view ad hoc and data model searches. `deep_dive` objects contain all of the elements required to render deep dive lanes.

attributes.name: _key
attributes.label: _key
attributes.description: Auto-generated unique identifier for this deep dive.

attributes.name: description
attributes.label: description
attributes.description: User-defined description for this deep dive.

attributes.name: earliest_time
attributes.label: earliest_time
attributes.description: Earliest time for all of the searches in this deep dive.

attributes.name: latest_time
attributes.label: latest_time
attributes.description: Latest time for all of the searches in this deep dive.

attributes.name: focus_id
attributes.label: focus_id
attributes.description: The service id of the service in focus.

attributes.name: topology_id
attributes.label: topology_id
attributes.description: Define the service to be put in focus in the deep dive topology view. If none exists then the focus_id is set as the topology_id. view sidebar

attributes.name: lane_settings_collection
attributes.label: lane_settings_collection
attributes.description: <Array of lane settings specifying each lane's configuration. See Deep Dive Lane Settings.

attributes.name: is_named
attributes.label: is_named
attributes.description: True when the deep dive is saved, false otherwise.

attributes.name: create_by
attributes.label: create_by
attributes.description: The user who created this object.

attributes.name: create_source
attributes.label: create_source
attributes.description: The sourcetype initiating create. Has value `manual` for user-initiated creates. For internal use only.

attributes.name: create_time
attributes.label: create_time
attributes.description: Timestamp at the time of creation based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: mod_source
attributes.label: mod_source
attributes.description: Sourcetype initiating modification. Has value `manual` for user-initiated modifications. For internal use only.

attributes.name: mod_time
attributes.label: mod_time
attributes.description: Timestamp of the last modification based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: _user
attributes.label: _user
attributes.description: User who performed the most recent operation on this object.

attributes.name: version
attributes.label: version
attributes.description: The version of the object. Currently the same as the ITSI app version.
